header.headline: Architecture Overview
header.subtitle: A broad overview diagram should surface the major runtime lanes and their handoff points.

input.title: Input Surface
input.body: Requests, tokens, and configuration enter the system through one visible ingress.

planner.title: Planner Layer
planner.body: Routing and configuration decisions turn user intent into executable structure.

runtime.title: Runtime Core
runtime.body: Kernels, memory layout, and scheduling perform the actual work.

artifacts.title: Artifacts
artifacts.body: Outputs, logs, and probes emerge as the visible products of the run.

outcome.title: Operational View
outcome.body: A good overview keeps the main lanes legible without drowning in local detail.

footer.note: Overviews are useful when they compress the system into a stable handoff map.
